lines: +  // An inlined entry-only registration is a bare params object (no source chunk).

+  // An inlined entry-only registration is a bare params object (no source chunk).
+   * Registers a chunk. `chunk` is `undefined` for an inlined entry-only registration
+   * (no source chunk): the params' other chunks are loaded and its runtime modules run
+// `chunkPath` is the source chunk; it is `undefined` for entry-only registrations,
@@ -36,11 +36,13 @@ const chunkResolvers: Map<ChunkUrl, ChunkResolver> = new Map()
+      // `chunk` is `undefined` for an inlined entry-only registration, which has no source chunk.
// Furthermore, modules must be instantiated synchronously, hence we don't
+      // Entry-only registrations (`chunk == null`) are inlined into the HTML and only produced
+      // for the browser/DOM runtime; the edge ("none") runtime never receives them (its chunks
+        throw new Error('inline entry registration is not supported')
-    // Registering chunks and chunk lists depends on the BACKEND variable, which is set by the
